title: Shadows of the Fallen

roadmap.name: Phase 1: Project Setup
tasks: Set up Unity project with necessary assets and plugins
Configure version control system (Git)
Create initial project structure and folder organization

roadmap.name: Phase 2: Pre-production Planning
tasks: Develop detailed game design document (GDD) including mechanics, UI/UX, and storyboards
Create concept art and preliminary 3D models for key characters and environments
Establish art style and visual guidelines for consistent look and feel

roadmap.name: Phase 3: Asset Creation
tasks: Model and texture main characters using Blender
Design and create environment assets such as buildings and terrain
Produce sound effects and music tracks
Develop UI elements and HUD designs

roadmap.name: Phase 4: Core Gameplay Development
tasks: Implement real-time combat mechanics
Develop turn-based strategy mechanics for resource management and planning
Integrate crafting system for weapon creation and upgrades
Program healing and health management features
Build resource management system for gathering and allocating supplies

roadmap.name: Phase 5: Polishing and Testing
tasks: Optimize performance and fix bugs
Conduct playtesting sessions to gather feedback
Refine gameplay balance based on tester feedback
Address QA consistency issues identified in the report

roadmap.name: Phase 6: Deployment and Release
tasks: Prepare final builds for target platforms (PC)
Submit game to relevant app stores and digital distribution platforms
Launch marketing campaign and social media promotion

flow_map: Asset creation using Blender and Photoshop
Gameplay programming using Unity and C#
Integration of assets and gameplay mechanics

critical_tasks: Implement core combat and strategy mechanics
Develop resource management and crafting systems
Create and integrate player character models and animations
Design and implement user interface and HUD elements
Optimize performance and fix critical bugs
optional_tasks: Add additional enemy types and AI behaviors
Include more advanced particle effects and lighting
Enhance audio with ambient sounds and dynamic music
future_expansion: Develop mobile and console versions of the game
Add cooperative and competitive multiplayer modes
Release downloadable content (DLC) with new characters and storylines

generated_files.Roadmap.md:
# Development Roadmap

## Phase 1: Project Setup
- [ ] Set up Unity project with necessary assets and plugins
- [ ] Configure version control system (Git)
- [ ] Create initial project structure and folder organization

## Phase 2: Pre-production Planning
- [ ] Develop detailed game design document (GDD) including mechanics, UI/UX, and storyboards
- [ ] Create concept art and preliminary 3D models for key characters and environments
- [ ] Establish art style and visual guidelines for consistent look and feel

## Phase 3: Asset Creation
- [ ] Model and texture main characters using Blender
- [ ] Design and create environment assets such as buildings and terrain
- [ ] Produce sound effects and music tracks
- [ ] Develop UI elements and HUD designs

## Phase 4: Core Gameplay Development
- [ ] Implement real-time combat mechanics
- [ ] Develop turn-based strategy mechanics for resource management and planning
- [ ] Integrate crafting system for weapon creation and upgrades
- [ ] Program healing and health management features
- [ ] Build resource management system for gathering and allocating supplies

## Phase 5: Polishing and Testing
- [ ] Optimize performance and fix bugs
- [ ] Conduct playtesting sessions to gather feedback
- [ ] Refine gameplay balance based on tester feedback
- [ ] Address QA consistency issues identified in the report

## Phase 6: Deployment and Release
- [ ] Prepare final builds for target platforms (PC)
- [ ] Submit game to relevant app stores and digital distribution platforms
- [ ] Launch marketing campaign and social media promotion
generated_files.FlowMap.md:
# Production Workflow & Dependencies

## Step-by-Step Workflow
1. Pre-production planning and design
2. Asset creation using Blender and Photoshop
3. Gameplay programming using Unity and C#
4. Integration of assets and gameplay mechanics
5. Polishing and optimization
6. Testing and debugging
7. Final build preparation and deployment

## Core Dependency Graph
- CombatSystem -> WeaponCrafting -> Resources -> Inventory -> PlayerCharacter
- StrategySystem -> ResourceManagement -> PlayerCharacter -> Inventory -> UI
- HealingSystem -> MedicalSupplies -> PlayerCharacter -> UI -> HUD
- Environment -> Terrain -> Lighting -> PostProcessing -> Camera
generated_files.Tasks.md:
# Project Tasks

## Critical Path Tasks (MVP)
- [ ] Implement core combat and strategy mechanics
- [ ] Develop resource management and crafting systems
- [ ] Create and integrate player character models and animations
- [ ] Design and implement user interface and HUD elements
- [ ] Optimize performance and fix critical bugs

## Optional Tasks
- [ ] Add additional enemy types and AI behaviors
- [ ] Include more advanced particle effects and lighting
- [ ] Enhance audio with ambient sounds and dynamic music
- [ ] Expand multiplayer functionality
- [ ] Incorporate more detailed character backstories

## Future Expansion
- [ ] Develop mobile and console versions of the game
- [ ] Create additional levels and missions
- [ ] Add cooperative and competitive multiplayer modes
- [ ] Release downloadable content (DLC) with new characters and storylines
- [ ] Implement virtual reality (VR) support

title: Mock Adventure Project

roadmap.name: Phase 1: Project Setup
tasks: Set up project repository
Create initial project structure
Install necessary dependencies

roadmap.name: Phase 2: Backend Development
tasks: Design database schema for resources and user data
Implement resource management endpoints using FastAPI
Integrate Supabase for authentication and database services

roadmap.name: Phase 3: Frontend Development
tasks: Set up React frontend
Design UI components for scavenging and shooting mechanics
Implement basic user interface for resource management

roadmap.name: Phase 4: Integration and Testing
tasks: Connect frontend to backend APIs
Test core functionalities including resource management and user authentication
Debug and fix issues identified during testing

roadmap.name: Phase 5: Deployment
tasks: Deploy backend on cloud server
Deploy frontend on web hosting service
Configure domain and SSL certificate

generated_files.FlowMap.md:
# Production Workflow & Dependencies

## Step-by-Step Workflow
1. Set up project repository and initial structure
2. Design database schema and implement backend services using FastAPI
3. Set up React frontend and design UI components
4. Connect frontend to backend APIs and test integration
5. Deploy backend and frontend to respective hosting services

## Core Dependency Graph
- Supabase -> Database -> FastAPI -> Backend
- FastAPI -> Backend -> React -> Frontend
generated_files.Tasks.md:
# Project Tasks

## Critical Path Tasks (MVP)
- [ ] Set up project repository
- [ ] Design database schema for resources and user data
- [ ] Implement resource management endpoints using FastAPI
- [ ] Set up React frontend
- [ ] Connect frontend to backend APIs
- [ ] Deploy backend and frontend

## Optional Tasks
- [ ] Add more detailed UI animations
- [ ] Implement additional game mechanics such as crafting
- [ ] Enhance user experience with better error handling

## Future Expansion
- [ ] Develop mobile version of the game
- [ ] Add multiplayer functionality
- [ ] Expand world setting with new areas and challenges
